case_title: HUI ZHEN YU VS. REBECCA ANN WITT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED FEE CHARGED $30.00 SERVED SEP-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WITT, REBECCA ANN
